Module_4 assignment - Flask app db backend with tests

User Guide

  • Getting Started
  • Architecture
  • Testing Guide

API Reference

  • app — Flask application
  • db_config — database connection settings
  • query_data — SQL analysis queries
  • load_data — JSON loader
  • create_database — database initialization
